channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Punjab Assembly Enacts Law Making 18 the Minimum Age for Marriage for Both Genders
item.description: LAHORE: The Punjab Assembly on Monday approved the Child Marriage Restraint Bill 2026, setting the minimum legal age for marriage at 18 years for both boys and girls, and making underage marriage a no...

item.title: Nigeria domestic airlines threaten 7-day shutdown over soaring fuel prices
item.description: Naija domestic airlines don give government 48-hour ultimatum as the price of aviation fuel don climb sharply from ₦900 to ₦3,300 per litre in just two months. If nothing serious happen, all local fli...

item.title: How climate change is increasing vulnerability to violent extremism in north-eastern Kenya
item.description: This article explains how climate change is not only an environmental issue in Kenya but also a growing security concern, especially in the north-eastern regions such as Garissa and Wajir. Increasing ...

item.title: King Charles and Queen Camilla Begin US State Visit Amid Diplomatic Tensions
item.description: King Charles III and Queen Camilla are set to undertake their first state visit to the United States since he became monarch, aiming to strengthen the strained UK-US relationship. The visit comes amid...

item.title: Recommended Dishes at Manam, Ayala Triangle, Makati
item.description: Manam, located at the Ayala Triangle in Makati, is a well-known dining spot celebrated for its modern take on classic Filipino dishes. Recognized with a Michelin Bib Gourmand, the restaurant offers a ...

item.title: Justice Ofili-Ajumogobia Withdraws from Police Case Involving BLord and VDM, Case to be Reassigned
item.description: Justice Rita Ofili-Ajumogobia for Federal High Court Abuja don recuse herself from the criminal case wey Nigeria Police bring against Linus Williams, wey people sabi as BLord. The case dey related to ...

item.title: Othman Masoud Othman calls for patience as CCM-ACT Wazalendo political talks in Zanzibar approach conclusion
item.description: Zanzibar's former First Vice President and national chairman of ACT Wazalendo, Othman Masoud Othman, has urged citizens to remain patient as ongoing discussions between major political parties on the ...

item.title: Yanga and Simba coaches prepare for intense Union Cup final and league derby
item.description: Traditional rivals Young Africans (Yanga) and Simba SC are set to face each other twice in just five days, creating big pressure on their head coaches Pedro Goncalves and Steven Barker. The first matc...

item.title: Graphene Oxide Targets Bacteria Without Harming Human Cells
item.description: Researchers at the Korea Advanced Institute of Science and Technology (KAIST) have identified how graphene oxide selectively destroys harmful bacteria while leaving human cells unharmed. The material,...

item.title: VHP urges UN intervention on minority rights issues in Pakistan and Bangladesh before UNGA President's India visit
item.description: The Vishva Hindu Parishad (VHP) has written a letter to UN General Assembly President Annalena Baerbock, one day before her scheduled visit to India. In the letter dated April 27, 2026, VHP internatio...

item.title: Ben Youssef criticises Pirates over pre-match altercation at Soweto derby
item.description: During the Soweto derby at FNB Stadium on Sunday, Kaizer Chiefs co-coach Kalil Ben Youssef openly criticised Orlando Pirates following a tense pre-match incident. Prior to kick-off, a physical alterca...

item.title: Progress and Challenges in South Africa's Agricultural Sector 32 Years into Democracy
item.description: In his Freedom Day speech on 27 April 2026, President Cyril Ramaphosa highlighted the sacrifices made for liberation while noting that the journey to full economic freedom and social justice in South ...

item.title: Apple’s Strategic Outlook and Upcoming Product Plans Under CEO John Ternus
item.description: Apple is preparing for notable shifts under its incoming CEO, John Ternus, who previously led the company's hardware division. Analysts and tech blogs anticipate a mix of incremental and innovative pr...

item.title: Greytown community forms ratepayer association to improve municipal service delivery
item.description: Residents of Greytown have taken a proactive step towards addressing long-standing service delivery challenges by establishing the Greytown Resident and Ratepayer Association (GRRA). This initiative w...

item.title: Jeridah Andayi Highlights the Challenges and Realities of Marriage
item.description: Former radio presenter Jeridah Andayi has openly shared about the challenges of maintaining a marriage, describing it as one of the hardest relationships to sustain. Speaking on Facebook, she emphasiz...

item.title: Poisonous wild sorghum grass kills over 80 cattle in Adamawa community
item.description: Over 80 cattle don die in Chafajaule village, Ribadu District of Fufore Local Government Area for Adamawa State after dem chop one kind harmful grass wey Fulfulde people dey call ngayari, which na wil...

item.title: Five Kenyan Clean Cooking Companies Target Sh5.6bn to Expand Eco-Friendly Cooking Solutions
item.description: Five Kenyan clean cooking companies are jointly seeking to raise about Sh5.6 billion from international investors in order to expand their operations and scale up the distribution of eco-friendly cook...

item.title: Ross Lyon apologises to Indigenous players for inappropriate comment at St Kilda training
item.description: St Kilda AFL coach Ross Lyon has issued an emotional apology following an inappropriate comment made about Indigenous players during a training session earlier this month. The remark, referencing the ...

item.title: Trump administration officials targeted in Washington gala attack, suspect arrested
item.description: On Saturday night, an alleged attack on top US officials at the White House Correspondents' Association dinner in Washington D.C. was thwarted when 31-year-old Cole Tomas Allen of Torrance, California...

item.title: FDA Approves Human Trial for Brain Implant Targeting Treatment-Resistant Depression
item.description: Motif Neurotech, a Houston-based startup founded in 2022, has received FDA approval to begin human trials for its innovative brain implant designed to treat severe depression. Unlike other brain-compu...
